name: ezjww
description: JWW parser and DXF converter for TypeScript, powered by Rust WebAssembly.

scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build ../../crates/ezjww-wasm --target nodejs --out-dir ../../packages/ezjww/wasm --out-name ezjww_wasm --release && node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('wasm/.gitignore', { force: true })"
scripts.build: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:ts
scripts.example:browser:wasm: wasm-pack build ../../crates/ezjww-wasm --target web --out-dir ../../packages/ezjww/examples/browser/src/wasm --out-name ezjww_wasm --release && node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('examples/browser/src/wasm/.gitignore', { force: true })"
scripts.example:browser:build: pnpm run example:browser:sample && pnpm run example:browser:wasm && vite build examples/browser
scripts.example:browser:dev: pnpm run example:browser:sample && pnpm run example:browser:wasm && vite --host 127.0.0.1 examples/browser
